description_long: This lamp features a modern, minimalist design with a cylindrical black base supporting a slender vertical rod. At the top of the rod is a spherical decorative finial in a light wood or stone finish. The lamp head is a circular, drum-shaped housing with a white interior reflector, positioned partway up the rod and oriented horizontally. A visible power cord extends from the base, suggesting it is electrically powered. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a strong contrast between the matte black body and the lighter accent sphere.
description: A modern floor lamp with a black cylindrical base, a vertical rod, a spherical finial, and a drum-shaped lamp head with a white reflector.
description_view_0: The lamp is seen at an angle, showing the cylindrical base, vertical rod, spherical finial, and the circular lamp head with its white interior.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the thickness of the lamp head and the alignment of the rod, base, and finial, with the power cord more visible.
description_view_2: A direct front view, showing the lamp head's circular face and the symmetry of the rod, base, and finial.
description_view_3: Another side view from the opposite direction, emphasizing the lamp head's depth and the spherical finial's position.
